## Checklist

- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Format is consistent (`npm run format:check`)
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm run test:run`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] E2E smoke test passes (`npx playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.ts`)
- [ ] CI is green on this branch (`.github/workflows/ci.yml`)
- [ ] Changelog updated with today's date heading
- [ ] Screenshots updated (if UI changed)
- [ ] README updated (if setup, features, or screenshots changed)
- [ ] Audit recommendation references included (e.g., `Audit #N`)
- [ ] If this is part of a merge train (sequential merges), tests were re-run on `master` after the previous merge
